innovation-research-hub.title: The Research Hub: Evidence-Based Practice

highRiskUnevidencedExamples: Our 'Research Hub' allows us to validate interventions at a scale never seen before.
unevidencedExamples: EdPsych Connect isn't just a software platform.
Our 'Research Hub' allows us to validate interventions at a scale never seen before.
When a school uses an intervention—say, 'Precision Teaching'—we track the impact.
We measure the baseline, the fidelity of implementation, and the outcome.
We aggregate this anonymised data across thousands of students.
We can say, with statistical confidence: "This intervention works best for Year 3 boys with working memory deficits." We also have an 'Ethics Submission Workflow' built in.
If you want to run a study, you can submit your proposal directly through the platform.
We are bridging the gap between academic research and classroom practice.

innovation-safety-net.title: The Safety Net: AI Risk Prediction

unevidencedExamples: In high-stakes environments like aviation or medicine, we don't wait for a crash to investigate.
We use predictive systems to prevent it.
This is our proprietary risk prediction engine.
It suggests a specific action: "Reallocate to Officer B" or "Request urgent Educational Psychologist advice." We calculate a 'Risk Score' for every child.
This is how we move from reactive firefighting to proactive protection.
We catch the fall before it happens.

notes: Found 10 claim-like sentence(s) with no configured code evidence anchor. This does not prove falsehood; it indicates missing evidence mapping or script wording that is hard to verify.
security-deep-dive.title: Security Deep Dive: Designed for Sensitive SEND Data

unevidencedExamples: When you're working with Special Educational Needs and Disabilities data, security isn't a feature — it's the foundation.
Here's what we mean by "security by design".
The platform is built around role-based permissions.
Users only see what they need for their role, and we follow the principle of least privilege.
Key actions are logged so that you can evidence appropriate access and decision-making, and investigate issues quickly.
Data is transmitted over encrypted connections, and we avoid exposing sensitive information in URLs or client-side state.
We treat secrets as configuration, not code.
That means environment variables for keys, and guardrails in our CI to prevent accidental leakage.

value-enterprise-platform.title: The £2.35 Million Platform

unevidencedExamples: The platform you're about to explore represents over two million pounds in development investment.
Then there's the enterprise stuff, the kind that requires six-figure contracts, implementation consultants, and a three-month onboarding process before you can even log in.
We looked at both of those options and thought: why should teachers and educational psychologists have to choose between inadequate tools and inaccessible ones?
What if you could have NHS-level data security, but with software that actually feels pleasant to use?
What if you could get the differentiation engine that automatically adapts materials for thirty different learning profiles, without needing a university's IT budget?
That's what we built.
An AI layer that helps with everything from report writing to study support.
But we didn't build this to sell to the highest bidder.
